items.title: Citizen's new Attesa CC4107-80H goes full-black with recrystallized titanium and satellite wave GPS
items.desc: Citizen Taiwan has unveiled the Attesa CC4107-80H — a blacked-out, 44 mm Super Titanium GPS watch featuring recrystallized titanine bracelet center links and the F950 Eco-Drive caliber. It's limited to 1,800 units worldwide, priced at NT$84,800 (~$2,600).
